error_signature: WhatsApp and Telegram authentication tokens won't work
title: Authentication tokens fail due to desynchronized system clock
symptom: Users may experience connection issues with WhatsApp and Telegram nodes, leading to failed authentication. This can prevent workflows from executing properly.
root_cause: If the system clock on the user's PC is not synchronized with the server's clock, authentication tokens for services like WhatsApp and Telegram may become invalid. This desynchronization can lead to failed connections and errors in workflows.
fix_steps: Manually sync your system clock with the correct time
agent_instruction: Ensure your system clock is synchronized with the server's time.
